summary: Iteration 76: Dynamic Experience System - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 31/31 pytest tests passed. Frontend: PersonalizedDashboard, Reading List page, and all UI elements working correctly.

issues: Reading List is not shown in the Explore pillar highlights on the landing page (only in nav menu). Consider adding 'Reading List' to CATEGORY_PILLARS explore highlights in Landing.js for better discoverability.

action_items: OPTIONAL: Add 'Reading List' to Explore pillar highlights in Landing.js CATEGORY_PILLARS for better discoverability
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 76 verified the Dynamic Experience System: (1) Activity Tracking - POST /api/activity/track silently logs page visits and interactions. (2) Personalized Dashboard - GET /api/dashboard/personalized returns time-based greeting, daily wisdom quote (deterministic per day), continue items, new for you features, and progress stats. (3) Spiritual Reading List - GET /api/reading-list returns 24 curated sacred texts with save/complete functionality. POST /api/reading-list/save handles save/unsave/complete/uncomplete. POST /api/reading-list/ai-recommendation provides AI-powered book recommendations. All APIs require auth. Frontend: PersonalizedDashboard renders above hero on landing page for logged-in users. Reading List page at /reading-list with search, filters (All, For You, Saved, Read, Essential, Intermediate, Advanced), and book cards with heart/check buttons.

activity_tracking.description: Lightweight activity tracker that silently logs page visits and interactions to power personalization

personalized_dashboard.description: Dynamic dashboard for logged-in users showing personalized content based on activity and time

features.continue_items: Recent activities for 'Continue Where You Left Off'
features.progress: Stats: streak_days, total_sessions, mood_entries, journal_entries, ai_sessions, features_discovered
